built_recently: Big week under the hood. The hero algorithm was picking Tom Steyer (California Governor, Nov 2026, $45K traded today) over Iran ($3.5M traded today) and March Madness. Fixed. Volume is now the story — a market with $3M+ in action doesn't need a 5-point move to earn the front page. We also shipped two home page designs: the current dark/minimal look and a new Stitch design (volt green, terminal aesthetic). Both are live at theprobnewsletter.com — toggle between them and let me know which you prefer.
coming_next: Yesterday's Biggest Swings (daily snapshot diff showing which markets moved most in 24h), a Closing Soon rail for markets resolving within 72 hours near 50/50, and watching which homepage design readers prefer. Vote with the feedback buttons at the top of either page.
